analysis.name: Jito
analysis.summary: JTO近期因Solana生态Jito网络推出市场层（Market Layer）及JTX Trade上线预期而大幅上涨，但24小时回调12.4%，短期涨幅过大存在获利回吐压力。基本面扎实，但估值已不低，建议观望。

recommendation.invalidation: 若价格跌破0.55美元（近期低点）或市场层上线后TVL增长不及预期，则逻辑失效。

catalysts: Solana市场层（Market Layer）上线，提升Jito网络收入预期
JTX Trade平台即将推出，可能增加JTO需求
JitoSOL TVL持续增长，巩固Solana生态龙头地位

latestNews.title: Jito Surges as Solana’s Market Layer Goes Live — Can JTO Price Extend Its Rally Beyond $1?
latestNews.reason: 市场层上线是近期主要催化剂，直接提升Jito网络价值捕获能力。

latestNews.title: Jito (JTO) Surges 30% on Solana Layer News, Pulls Back 4.5%
latestNews.reason: 新闻确认上涨由市场层驱动，但随后回调显示短期获利盘涌出。

latestNews.title: JTO pumps 40% – Will Jito reclaim $1 ahead of the JTX Trade debut?
latestNews.reason: JTX Trade上线预期进一步刺激买盘，但需关注实际落地效果。

fundamentals: Jito是Solana生态最大流动性质押协议，JitoSOL TVL超20亿美元
JTO为治理代币，持有者可参与协议治理和费用分配
代币总供应量10亿，当前流通约4.89亿，流通率48.9%
项目获Multicoin Capital、Alameda Research等顶级机构投资
marketRead: 24小时价格下跌12.4%，但7日涨幅仍达11.2%，30日涨幅43.5%，短期超买
DEX流动性2.74亿美元，深度良好，但24小时交易量仅0.47美元（疑似数据异常），需关注CEX成交量
当前价格0.5558美元，较ATH 6.01美元下跌87.7%，但近期从低点反弹幅度较大
risks: 短期涨幅过大，存在获利回吐和回调风险
市场层和JTX Trade实际效果待验证，若不及预期可能引发抛售
代币解锁压力：总供应量仍有约5.11亿未流通，未来解锁可能稀释价格
Solana生态竞争激烈，其他流动性质押协议（如mSOL、bSOL）可能分流TVL
watchlist: JTX Trade上线时间及用户增长
Solana整体市场情绪和SOL价格走势
sourceNotes: DEX交易量数据异常（24h仅0.47美元），可能因数据源问题，建议参考CEX成交量
新闻来源多为加密媒体，部分为预测性内容，需谨慎对待

profile.name: Jito
profile.description: JTO is the governance token of the Jito Network. Jito Network is a major contributor to the Solana ecosystem through its JitoSOL liquid staking pool, and its collection of MEV products. Users can exchange their SOL for JitoSOL. In return, holders maintain SOL’s liquidity and DeFi opportunities while earning yield from staking. JitoSOL uniquely provides its holders with additional rewards from transaction revenue associated with MEV extraction on Solana. Maximum extractable value (MEV) describes profit opportunities attributable to the specific order of transaction execution. For example, a large swap on Orca can lower the pool’s price below that of Raydium or Serum. Traders will race to profit from that price difference and this arbitrage is considered MEV. The Jito Foundation was created to minimize the negative impacts of MEV, equitably distribute the profits and increase transparency. Jito published an open source validator client designed to create a competitive market for MEV extraction. The client enables auctions within each block for the opportunity to capture that block’s MEV. Traders submit bids, and the highest bidders within each block can harvest available MEV.
